classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于完整标注图右侧黄色框内，为'输入 Input'端面视图，包含圆形法兰、方形安装面、孔位、中心线及'C2'、'ΦC1'、'45°'、'C7'等尺寸代号和角度标注，表达安装孔距、外形与定位尺寸，未出现针脚功能或曲线数据。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected diameter symbol from ∅ to Φ.

terminology_notes: Symbolic dimensions C1, C2, and C7 require the dimensional table for numeric values.

dimension_records.reason: Visible text labels this crop as the input-side view, not a dimensional value.
Leader points to the upper-right mounting plate corner feature, indicating symbolic mounting dimension C2.
Diameter symbol with C1 points to the circular hole pattern reference on the input face.
Angular dimension arc on the left side marks a 45 degree spacing for the mounting pattern.
Second angular dimension arc on the left side independently marks another 45 degree spacing.
Square symbol and C7 are attached to the bottom horizontal dimension line spanning the mounting square.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Input-side mounting interface includes symbolic corner feature C2, diameter C1 hole pattern reference, square mounting dimension C7, and two 45° angular callouts.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Numeric values for C1, C2, and C7 are not visible in the target crop and require the dimensional table.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 该裁剪区域展示的是零部件输出侧的圆形端面尺寸示意，包含多个孔位、直径标注、45°角度标注以及深度尺寸，如 'ΦD8h7深(depth)L9'、'ΦD5'、'D6深(depth)L3'、'ΦD2'、'ΦD7'、'ΦD10'，属于典型机械尺寸图而非接线或针脚定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪框对应完整源图中绿色标注的减速机侧视尺寸图，包含外形轮廓、轴向长度尺寸'C4'、'C9'、'L8'、'L4'、端部倒角'L10X45°'以及直径尺寸'ΦD11'、'ΦD1H7'、'ΦD3h7'、'ΦD12'、'ΦD4h7'等，属于机械结构尺寸标注。

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Visible connector and mounting-related dimensions include ΦC5, ΦC3, C6, C10, C8, C4, and C9.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Visible shaft/interface dimensions include ΦD1H7, ΦD3h7, ΦD4h7, ΦD9, ΦD11, ΦD12, L1, L3, L4, L5, L6, L7, L8, and L10X45° chamfer.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Overall or major envelope callouts include C9 as total length and L8 as main body length.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector-side dimensions are parameter-coded only; numeric table values are not visible in the target crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Actual numeric values for letter-coded parameters are not specified in the target crop.

unresolved_items.issue: Discarded as OCR noise or line/geometry misrecognition; no reliable independent engineering text visible for these source boxes.

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
